text: Disease 9(CHD) is also higher in urban areas as compared to their rural counterparts. The incidence rate of cancer is comparatively higher among women (123) compared to 10 men (113 for 100,000) . The overall production of food grains (cereals/millets/pulses) recorded a significant increase from about 108 million tones in 1970-71 to a little over 230 million 11,12 tones during 2007-2008 . Though the production of cereals and millets appears to be adequate, production of pulses, the source of protein for the rural poor, actually shows a decline. Total Production of vegetables is about 30% less than the demand 13 of 100 million tones . The total production of milk during 2006-2007 was about 100.9 million tones, corresponding to about 245 g per caput per day, which is lower than 14 the world
